Quarterly ONE Thing: Replace 1 operator function with a system
Diagnosis (Constraint): System depends on founder too often — every decision routes through one person
Guiding Policy: Stabilise cash engine + protect build blocks as non-negotiable
Coherent Actions (3 max): Delegate one function with written SOP; systemise quoting into template; batch all comms to two daily windows

Quarterly ONE Thing: Scale architect output while maintaining operator stability
Diagnosis (Constraint): Operator load reduced but not yet self-sustaining — team needs confidence
Guiding Policy: Expand architect capacity only after operator machine proves independent
Coherent Actions (3 max): Add third weekly build block; hire or contract one operator support role; implement monthly no-touch day as standard

Quarterly ONE Thing: Transition to full architect role with operator oversight only
Diagnosis (Constraint): Operator machine functional but requires periodic founder calibration
Guiding Policy: Reduce founder operator involvement to weekly oversight + quarterly strategy
Coherent Actions (3 max): Install operator lead with decision authority; move to weekly operator check-in only; dedicate 80% to Venturr build
